LAW AND MOTION 302, NO APPEARANCE ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. DEFENDANT PACIFIC GAS AND ELECTRIC COMPANY'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT/ADJUDICATION IS CONTINUED TO FEBRUARY 24, 2014 TO GIVE OPPOSING PARTY THE OPPORTUNITY TO COMPLY WITH LOCAL RULE 2.6B. OPPOSING PARTY MUST DELIVER COURTESY COPIES OF THE OPPOSING PAPERS TO DEPARTMENT 302, WITH A COVER LETTER STATING THE NEW HEARING DATE, NO LATER THAN FEBRUARY 5, 2014 AT 4:00 PM OR THE MOTION WILL BE GRANTED. ANY EXHIBIT MUST BE SEPARATED BY AN EXHIBIT TAB PER CRC 3.1110(F). THE COURT HAS COURTESY COPIES OF THE MOVING AND REPLY PAPERS. JUDGE: ERNEST H. GOLDSMITH, CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT, NOT REPORTED.

Off Calendar Apr-14-2014 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
DEFENDANT PACIFIC GAS AND ELECTRIC COMPANY's MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT/Adjudication is Off calendar. On April 4, 2014, the Court issued its Order. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert, Not reported. =(302/EHG)

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT /Adjudication
Off Calendar Mar-13-2014 Continued To Apr-14-14 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances:
Jesper I. Rasmussen, Esq. of Lafayette & Kumagai LLP, Tel. 415.357.4600, for defendant and moving party;
Amy L. Sekany, Esq. of Wylie McBride Platten & Renner, Tel. 408.979.2920, for plaintiff and opposing party.

RULING: A R G U E D. At the conclusion of argument, the Court continues DEFENDANT PACIFIC GAS AND ELECTRIC COMPANY's MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT/Adjudication to April 14, 2014 at 9:30 am in Department 302. Plaintiff shall submit a proposed order no later than March 24, 2014. The Court shall issue a ruling on or before the continued hearing date. If the Court signs an order before April 14, 2014, no hearing will be required. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR# 5976.
